## Issue description

Clearly describe the problem, including what you were trying to do when it
occurred.

## Steps to reproduce

Provide the smallest reliable set of steps that recreates the issue.

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead? Include any relevant error messages.

## Diagnostics report

Open **Settings → Diagnostics**, copy the diagnostics report, and paste it
below. Remove any information you are not comfortable sharing publicly.

<details>
<summary>Diagnostics report (click to expand)</summary>

## Additional context

Add screenshots, recordings, logs, configuration details, or other context
that may help us investigate. For UI issues, include the browser and device
used.

## Security issues

Do not report security vulnerabilities in public issues. Follow the private
reporting process in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) instead.
